zh.Saint-Calais, Eure-et-Loir, Centre-Val d: 法國艾-吉洛易沙吉卡拉斯
zh.Mondoubleau, Loir-Et-Cher, France: 法國洛易-吉黑蒙多布利奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de Saint-Calais於大約1115年出生在法國洛易-吉黑蒙多布利奧時，她的父親Sylvestre De St. Calais36歲，母親Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome26歲。她於大約1135年與Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV在法國崔洛易-吉黑結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1185年在法國崔洛易-吉黑享年71歲。

zh-hans.Mondoubleau, Loir-Et-Cher, France: 法国洛易-吉黑蒙多布利奧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de Saint-Calais于大约1115年出生在法国洛易-吉黑蒙多布利奧时，她的父亲Sylvestre De St. Calais36岁，母亲Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome26岁。她于大约1135年与Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV在法国崔洛易-吉黑结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1185年在法国崔洛易-吉黑享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de Saint-Calais was born about 1115, in Mondoubleau, Loir-et-Cher, France, her father, Sylvestre De St. Calais, was 36 and her mother, Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome, was 26. She married Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV about 1135, in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1185, in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de Saint-Calais est née environ 1115, à Mondoubleau, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Sylvestre De St. Calais, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV environ 1135, à Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1185, à Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de Saint-Calais um 1115 in Mondoubleau, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sylvestre De St. Calais 36 und ihre Mutter Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome 26. Sie hat um 1135 in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Saint-Calais è nata il circa 1115 nel Mondoubleau, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, sua padre, Sylvestre De St. Calais, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV circa 1135, nel Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1185, nel Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Saint-Calaisが約1115年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーモンドウブレアウで生まれた時，父Sylvestre De St. Calaisは36歳，母Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendomeは26歳であった。約1135年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーでHughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1185年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de Saint-Calais(이)가 대략 1115년 프랑스 로이-트-처 몽우블리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sylvestre De St. Calais(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1135년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처에서 Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de Saint-Calais nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Mondoubleau, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Sylvestre De St. Calais, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV aproximadamente 1135, em Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1185, em Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de Saint-Calais родилась около 1115 г. в местности мондоубло, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, её отцу по имени Sylvestre De St. Calais было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV около 1135 г. в местности лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1185 г. в местности лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de Saint-Calais nació aproximadamente 1115, en Mondoubleau, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, su papá, Sylvestre De St. Calais, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Adele Havoise Mondoubleau de Vendome, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Hughes de Châteaudun de Freteval IV aproximadamente 1135, en Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1185, en Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia, a la edad de 71 años.
